rationale: Data Engineer at Meesho (product e-commerce company) with BM25 and QLoRA skills listed, but only 3.9 years total experience and self-described as wanting to transition into ML rather than having shipped production retrieval or ranking systems.

Summary describes a marketing manager background with no engineering depth, career spans Stark Industries (fictional honeypot), and two stints at Wipro in Mechanical Engineer and Accountant titles with zero ML or IR skills.

Nine years of backend/cloud work but the majority is at IT-services firms (HCL, Accenture) and includes a role at Dunder Mifflin (fictional honeypot); Recommendation Systems is listed as an advanced skill but no production embedding retrieval or ranking evaluation evidence exists.

Entire career is in non-technical roles (Graphic Designer, Content Writer, Marketing Manager) spread across TCS and the fictional Dunder Mifflin, with no ML, IR, or production engineering experience despite a Ph.D in Mathematics from Manipal.

Has a stint at Flipkart (product company, positive signal) and a tier_2 VJTI education, but includes a role at fictional Pied Piper, spent significant time at Infosys in .NET/QA work, and top skills are HTML/PowerPoint/Spring Boot with only 10 months of beginner-level Deep Learning — no production IR or ranking experience.

Non-technical career as Graphic Designer and Content Writer with a marketing manager summary, includes a role at fictional Initech, and the only ML-adjacent skill is TTS (speech domain explicitly excluded by the JD).

Business Analyst and Marketing Manager roles entirely at fictional Initech and Hooli with no engineering or ML work; skills are React/Webpack/AWS all at beginner level with brief durations, confirming no production AI engineering background.

Career consists of Mechanical Engineer at fictional Wayne Enterprises and Sales Executive at fictional Pied Piper (two honeypot signals), a marketing manager summary, and no ML or IR skills — IIT Kanpur Ph.D in Computer Engineering is on paper but the actual work history is entirely non-technical.

Entire 13-year career is at IT-services firms (Infosys, TCS) in non-technical roles (Business Analyst, Accountant, Project Manager) — an explicit disqualifier per the JD — with all skills at beginner level and no ML or retrieval experience.

Twelve-year career split across Wipro/Infosys (IT services) in non-engineering roles (Business Analyst, Graphic Designer, Operations Manager) and fictional Initech, with Statistical Modeling listed as advanced but no production ML, IR, or ranking system work evident.
